description: IP and leak-risk indicators. These flag structural patterns only — no proprietary code is stored or matched.

indicators.name: Claude Code source-map artifact
indicators.description: Presence of large JavaScript source-map files in paths resembling the Claude Code npm package structure. The original accidental leak included a 59.8 MB .js.map file.
indicators.legal_note: This indicator flags structural patterns only. No proprietary code is stored or matched. Possessing leaked source code may violate the vendor's terms of service.

indicators.name: Vendor-internal directory structure
indicators.description: Directory and file naming patterns that suggest the repo may contain mirrored internal/proprietary source trees from well-known AI vendors.
indicators.legal_note: This is a low-confidence heuristic. Many legitimate projects use similar naming. Review manually before taking action.

indicators.name: Oversized WebAssembly bundle in AI-tool path
indicators.description: Very large WASM bundles in paths associated with AI tooling repos. These may contain compiled proprietary source code from leaked builds.
indicators.legal_note: Large WASM bundles may contain compiled proprietary code. Review the source and licensing before redistributing.
